name: Canva AI (Magic Studio)
data_egress_concerns: Brand kit assets (logos, fonts, color palettes) uploaded to Canva are stored on vendor infrastructure
Design templates for internal communications may contain sensitive organizational charts or financial data
Magic Write text generation receives document context that may include confidential content
Magic Eraser and background removal process images through cloud AI pipelines
Shared design workspaces may expose internal materials to unauthorized collaborators
training_use_default: Canva states that Enterprise plan content is not used for AI training. Free and Pro tier content handling should be verified against current terms. Magic Studio features route through third-party AI providers whose policies also apply.
